textPlain: Since this library leverages Symbol.toPrimitive, you may also use operators besides bitwise-OR. Additionally, the library does not seem to dispatch on the `hint` parameter[0]. Now I want to open a JS REPL, try placing this library's pipe object into string template literals, and see what happens.Overall, cool library (despite a few points in the README being a bit vague / seemingly generated by an LLM. For instance, the bullet point about "no global mutation" is a bit vague, because the library clearly can't stop closures from accessing globalThis. I assume they mean the pipe object prevents internal state from leaking into closures).[0] https://tc39.es/ecma262/multipage/abstract-operations.html#s...
Further proof that JavaScript accidentally became the new C++.“Aren’t you surprised that this syntax works?” is not praise for a language design.
Sad that the pipe operator proposal seems to have stalled.The F# version of the proposal was probably the simplest choice.
